name: testBusinessUnitsListUpdatesOnCompanySelection
description: Check that selecting a company populates the 'Business units list', and when no company is selected, the list is empty with 'No items.'
descriptionHtml: Check that selecting a company populates the 'Business units list', and when no company is selected, the list is empty with 'No items.'
